item.title: Are VST Industries Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: VST Industries Ltd's Q4 FY26 results are strong, with a 93.74% increase in net profit and significant revenue growth, but long-term challenges remain due to low annual sales growth and negative EBIT trends in the tobacco industry. Overall, the quarterly performance is positive, yet future sustainability is uncertain. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are HDFC Asset Management Company Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: HDFC Asset Management Company Ltd's latest results show a decline in net profit to ₹622.66 crores due to a significant drop in other income, despite a 16.66% year-on-year growth in asset management fees. Overall, while there are challenges, the company's core business remains resilient with strong operational metrics. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Angel One Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Angel One Ltd's latest results are strong, with a net profit of ₹320.24 crores, an 83.50% year-on-year growth, and a revenue increase of 38.20%, indicating effective cost management and operational efficiency. The company is well-positioned for future opportunities in the retail broking market despite a revision in its evaluation. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Wipro Ltd. latest results good or bad?
item.description: Wipro Ltd.'s latest results show a 7.70% increase in net sales but a 1.90% decline in net profit, indicating mixed performance. While operating margins improved to 20.26%, challenges in client spending may affect future growth prospects. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are HDFC Life Insurance Company Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: HDFC Life Insurance Company's latest Q4 FY26 results show a net profit increase of 4.66% to ₹497.49 crores, but revenue fell 17.78% to ₹19,890 crores, raising concerns about operational challenges and reliance on non-operating income. Overall, the results indicate significant issues in core performance despite a strong balance sheet. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Alok Industries Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Alok Industries Ltd's latest results show significant revenue growth of 14.53% to ₹982.97 crores, but the company still faces serious financial distress with a net loss of ₹192.54 crores and negative shareholder equity of ₹20,630.12 crores, indicating ongoing challenges despite operational improvements. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Roselabs Finance Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Roselabs Finance Ltd's latest results are concerning, with zero revenue and a net loss of ₹0.16 crores in Q4 FY26, indicating significant operational challenges and financial distress, including a negative book value and a debt-to-equity ratio suggesting insolvency risks. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Waaree Renewable Technologies Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Waaree Renewable Technologies Ltd reported strong financial results for Q1 2026, with net sales up 131.31% year-on-year and net profit increasing by 66.02%. However, profit growth is slowing compared to sales, and operating profit margins have declined, raising concerns about future profitability amid competition. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are SG Finserve Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: SG Finserve Ltd's latest results are strong, with a 94.88% increase in revenue and a 77.68% rise in net profit, but rising interest expenses and below-average return on equity raise concerns about sustainability and profitability. Overall, while growth is impressive, challenges remain that need monitoring. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Bajaj Consumer Q4 FY26: Stellar Turnaround with 105% Profit Surge Powers Stock to New Highs
item.description: Bajaj Consumer Care Ltd. delivered a remarkable performance in Q4 FY26, posting a consolidated net profit of ₹63.60 crores, marking an exceptional 105.29% year-on-year surge and a robust 37.16% sequential improvement. The FMCG company's shares responded emphatically, soaring 9.80% to ₹470.45 on April 17, 2026, as investors celebrated the company's strongest quarterly performance in recent history. With a market capitalisation of ₹5,746 crores, the small-cap consumer goods manufacturer has delivered a staggering 171.07% return over the past year, dramatically outperforming both the Sensex and the broader FMCG sector. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: CRISIL Q4 FY26: Strong Revenue Growth Masks Margin Pressure and Valuation Concerns
item.description: CRISIL Ltd., India's premier credit rating and research agency, delivered a mixed performance in Q4 FY26 (January-March 2026), with impressive top-line expansion overshadowed by margin compression and a sequential profit decline. The company posted consolidated net profit of ₹233.26 crores for the quarter, marking a marginal 3.41% decline from Q3 FY26's ₹241.50 crores but representing a robust 45.93% year-on-year surge from ₹159.84 crores in Q4 FY25. The market, however, has responded positively, with shares surging 5.36% to ₹4,335.25 following the results announcement, suggesting investors remain optimistic about the company's growth trajectory despite near-term profitability concerns. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Akme Fintrade (India) Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Akme Fintrade (India) Ltd has crossed above the 200-day moving average, creating a golden cross on 17 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical and fundamental context presents a nuanced picture that tempers the enthusiasm typically associated with this signal. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Azad Engineering Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Azad Engineering Ltd has crossed above the 200-day moving average, signalling a golden cross on 17 Apr 2026. Yet, while daily moving averages point bullish, the broader technical picture presents a nuanced scenario that tempers the enthusiasm around this classic signal. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Megastar Foods Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Strong Technicals and Mixed Momentum
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Megastar Foods Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 17 Apr 2026. While this technical event often suggests a shift towards bullish momentum, the broader context of price action and fundamental data presents a nuanced picture that merits closer examination. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in General Insurance Corporation of India — On a Day the Stock Stalled. What the Mixed Signals Mean
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for General Insurance Corporation of India, signalling a golden cross on 17 Apr 2026. Yet, the stock closed flat on the day of the crossover, and monthly momentum indicators remain mildly bearish. This juxtaposition of signals calls for a detailed examination of whether the golden cross is a reliable indicator or a lone beacon amid mixed data. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in Wanbury Ltd — On a Day the Stock Fell 2.61%. What the Mixed Signals Mean
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Wanbury Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 17 Apr 2026. Yet, the stock declined 2.61% on the day this technical event occurred, while monthly momentum indicators remain mildly bearish. This juxtaposition of signals calls for a detailed examination of whether the golden cross is a reliable indicator or a misleading signal in this context. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in Narmada Gelatines Ltd Amid Strong Technicals and Positive Momentum
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Narmada Gelatines Ltd on 17 Apr 2026, signalling a golden cross. This technical event coincides with a robust 9.08% gain on the day and a generally bullish set of indicators across weekly and monthly timeframes, suggesting the crossover is supported by broader momentum rather than standing alone as a signal. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in Regent Enterprises Ltd — On a Day the Stock Gained 0.16%. What the Mixed Signals Mean
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Regent Enterprises Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 17 Apr 2026. Yet, the stock’s modest 0.16% gain on the day and a mixed technical backdrop suggest the signal warrants a nuanced interpretation rather than an outright bullish verdict. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do Thermax Ltd.'s Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Thermax Ltd., signalling a golden cross on 17 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical picture presents a nuanced view, with weekly and monthly indicators diverging and recent price momentum showing mixed signals. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do Gulshan Polyols Ltd's Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Gulshan Polyols Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 17 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical and fundamental picture presents a nuanced story that demands closer examination. Time: 3 hours ago
